example: 大きい家に住みたいです。
exampleTrans: I want to live in a big house.

example: 自分の部屋があります。
exampleTrans: I have my own room.
I cook in the kitchen.

example: 家族でリビングに集まります。
exampleTrans: The family gathers in the living room.
I rest in the bedroom.
I take a bath at night.
Where is the restroom?
I take off my shoes at the entrance.
I walk down the hallway.
I go up the stairs.
The roof was damaged.
I hang a picture on the wall.
I clean the floor.
It is a room with a high ceiling.
I open the window.
I knock on the door.
I lock the door.

example: テーブルに食事を並べます。
exampleTrans: I set the food on the table.
I sit in the chair.

example: ソファでテレビを見ます。
exampleTrans: I watch TV on the sofa.
I sleep in the bed.
I arrange books on the shelf.

example: 押し入れに布団を入れます。
exampleTrans: I put the futon in the closet.

example: 服をクローゼットにしまいます。
exampleTrans: I put my clothes in the wardrobe.

example: 冷蔵庫に食べ物を入れます。
exampleTrans: I put food in the refrigerator.

example: 電子レンジで温めます。
exampleTrans: I warm it up in the microwave.

example: 洗濯機で服を洗います。
exampleTrans: I wash clothes in the washing machine.
I vacuum the floor.
I turn on the air conditioner.
I watch TV.
I turn on the light.

example: ガスでお湯を沸かします。
exampleTrans: I boil water using gas.
I drink tap water.
I lay out the futon.

example: 柔らかい枕が好きです。
exampleTrans: I like a soft pillow.

example: 寒いので毛布をかけます。
exampleTrans: I put on a blanket because it is cold.
I close the curtain.
I dim the lighting.
I look at my face in the mirror.
I hang a clock on the wall.

example: 部屋に植物を置きます。
exampleTrans: I put plants in the room.

example: ゴミ箱にゴミを捨てます。
exampleTrans: I put garbage in the trash can.
I am moving next month.
I pay the rent.

example: アパートに住んでいます。
exampleTrans: I live in an apartment.

example: 二階に部屋があります。
exampleTrans: My room is on the second floor.

example: 地下に駐車場があります。
exampleTrans: There is a parking lot in the basement.
I plant flowers in the garden.

example: ベランダで洗濯物を干します。
exampleTrans: I hang laundry on the balcony.

example: 駐車場に車を止めます。
exampleTrans: I park my car in the parking space.
